title: 2025-12-31 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 10.29
description: Policy pressure tracker for 2025-12-31: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 10.29/100, signaling a low pressure regime as equity stress and volatility shaped the daily read. Read the charts, latest moves, and a concise market interpretation.
hero_summary: This custom framework combines equities, front-end rates, inflation expectations, and volatility into one daily score. On 2025-12-31, the score printed 10.29/100 in the low regime, with equity stress and volatility doing most of the work.
